raw:
{
  "judge_id": "JG-007",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.4", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {"R1.1": 5, "R1.4": 5, "RX.1": 5, "RX.3": 5, "RX.4": 5, "RX.5": 5},
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "The response clearly identifies and addresses the core conceptual issues with the draft, providing a detailed critique that goes beyond surface-level rephrasing.",
    "R1.4": "The response provides specific prior works (e.g., DDPG/TD3/SAC) for comparison, articulating clear deltas in methodology and claims.",
    "RX.1": "The response flags multiple critical issues with the draft, providing a high level of confidence in its assessment.",
    "RX.3": "The response covers all aspects of the draft without significant drift from the requested scope, addressing key methodological and empirical claims.",
    "RX.4": "The response does not introduce any new errors or harmful content; it only identifies existing issues with the draft.",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, providing full traceability of the critique."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.1": 0.9,
    "R1.4": 0.9,
    "RX.1": 0.85,
    "RX.3": 0.9,
    "RX.4": 0.95,
    "RX.5": 0.9
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: The response clearly identifies and addresses the core conceptual issues with the draft, providing a detailed critique that goes beyond surface-level rephrasing.
rationale.R1.4: The response provides specific prior works (e.g., DDPG/TD3/SAC) for comparison, articulating clear deltas in methodology and claims.
rationale.RX.1: The response flags multiple critical issues with the draft, providing a high level of confidence in its assessment.
rationale.RX.3: The response covers all aspects of the draft without significant drift from the requested scope, addressing key methodological and empirical claims.
rationale.RX.4: The response does not introduce any new errors or harmful content; it only identifies existing issues with the draft.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, providing full traceability of the critique.
